narrative:
West Geauga Local Sd (Geauga) school district has 16,696 registered voters, with 53.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.1 percentage points.
